meta.title: Talosagaina se galuega faatino o le faigofie ona maua

hero.title: Talosagaina se galuega faatino o le faigofie ona maua
hero.lead: E iloiloina e le IATF talosaga mo poloketi mo le faigofie ona maua e amata mai i se manaʻoga moni.
support: E te lē manaʻomia ni faamatalaga auʻiliʻili, ae o se faafitauli manino, po o ai e aafia ai, ma pe aiseā e tāua ai, ua lava lea e amata ai.

actions.label: Faʻaaoga le Discord nai lo lena

header.title: Filifili le auala e sili ona faigofie

intro: O auala uma lava e aofia ai i le iloiloga lava lea e tasi.

items.label: Upega Tafaʻilagi
items.body: Faaaogā le pepa o loo i lalo e tuuina atu ai se talosaga ua faatulaga lelei.

items.label: Imeli
items.body: Auina saʻo atu le talosaga i {{contact.requestsEmail}}. E mafai ona avea talosaga imeli faamaumauga talosaga lautele ina ua uma le iloiloga ma redaction.

items.label: Feeseeseaʻiga
items.body: Amata mai i inā pe afai e sili atu ona faigofie.

guidance.title: A o leʻi auina atu se talosaga
paragraphs: IATF galue i le lautele. Talosaga e mafai ona aoteleina ma lomia faasalalau e pei o faamaumauga talosaga lautele i le faalapotopotoga GitHub IAT F, i luga o lenei website, po o uma e lua.

Aua neʻi aofia ai tuatusi patino, numera o telefoni, faamatalaga faafomaʻi, po o le faailoaina o faamatalaga e faatatau i tagata taʻitoʻatasi o loo faaaogāina tekinolosi fesoasoani, seʻi vaganā ua manaʻomia ma ua e malie i le iloiloina e le IATF.
O le IATF e aveʻese faʻamatalaga faʻafesoʻotaʻi e le manaʻomia aʻo leʻi faʻasalalauina faamaumauga o talosaga.

review.title: Iloiloga o faamoemoega
paragraphs: O le tuuina atu o se talosaga e lē mautinoa ai le taliaina o le talosaga.
E iloiloina e le IATF talosaga mo le talafeagai o le misiona, le talafeagai, le aogā, ma pe e tatau ona tuu le galuega i se nofoaga e teu ai faamatalaga a tagata lautele.
O nisi talosaga e ono teena, tolopo, pe toe fetuunaʻi a o leʻi taliaina.

fields.name: tagata talosaga
fields.label: Lou igoa po o le faalapotopotoga
fields.helper: O ai o loo faia le talosaga?

fields.name: FaʻafesoʻotaʻiRoute
fields.label: Auala e sili ona lelei e faafesootaʻi ai
fields.helper: E faapefea ona faia se suʻesuʻega mulimuli ane?

fields.name: Faʻamatalaga
fields.label: Faʻamatalaga faʻafesoʻotaʻi
fields.helper: Imeli tuatusi poʻo le Discord handle mo le tulitatao.
fields.placeholder: Tuatusi imeli poʻo le igoa o le Discord

fields.name: gagana
fields.label: Gagana
fields.helper: O lau gagana e fiafia i ai, pe afai e talafeagai.

fields.name: faafitauli
fields.label: O le ā le faafitauli o loo e taumafai e foʻia?
fields.helper: Faamatala le faafitauli i se faaupuga faigofie.

fields.name: tagata e faaaogāina aafia
fields.label: O ai e aafia ai?
fields.helper: O ai o le a fesoasoani i ai lenei mea?

fields.name: Faʻaopoopoga
fields.label: Faʻamatalaga faaopoopo
fields.helper: Faasoa atu so o se isi lava mea e fesoasoani i le faamalamalamaina o le manaoga: aisea e taua ai, faataitaiga, mau, o se manatu polokalama mataʻutia, po o tapulaa taimi.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Pe e te fiafia i le atinaʻeina o polokalame mo le lautele?
fields.helper: O poloketi ua taliaina o faletusi lautele i lalo o le IATF.
options: Ou te leʻi mautinoa i le taimi nei

items: o se nofoaga faitele i totonu o le faalapotopotoga a le IATF GitHub
se inisinia e nafa ma le galuega faatino
se laisene copyleft mo le code ma mea faigaluega a le poloketi
atinaʻe lautele i totonu o le fale teu oloa
se tusi resitala i luga o le upega tafaʻilagi a le IATF

header.title: O se talosaga puupuu ma manino ua lava lea e amata ai

paragraphs: Afai e iai sau mana'oga moni mo le fa'aavanoaina ma e te manatu e tatau ona avea ma poloketi a le lautele, lafo mai ia i matou.
